invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$65500（基于ATR调整），或融资费率转正且价格停滞，或恐慌指数回升至中性。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $65500 (adjusted based on ATR), or funding rate turns positive with price stalling, or Fear & Greed Index recovers to neutral.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格突破$69500（基于ATR调整），或融资费率Z-score回落至中性，或恐慌指数进一步下跌。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks above $69500 (adjusted based on ATR), or funding rate Z-score falls to neutral, or Fear & Greed Index declines further.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格突破$2050（基于ATR调整），或融资费率Z-score回落至中性，或市场情绪突然转向乐观。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks above $2050 (adjusted based on ATR), or funding rate Z-score falls to neutral, or market sentiment suddenly turns optimistic.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$620（基于ATR调整），或融资费率Z-score回升至中性，或BTC大幅下跌拖累。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $620 (adjusted based on ATR), or funding rate Z-score recovers to neutral, or BTC declines significantly dragging it down.
